title: Doro Wot Cod Au Gratin
description: A French-inspired cod dish featuring Ethiopian flavors in a creamy, cheesy au gratin.

ingredients.name: cod
ingredients.amount: 1 pound, skin removed, cut into 4 portions

ingredients.name: doro wot
ingredients.notes: or substitute with Ethiopian-inspired spice blend

instructions: Season cod with salt and Ethiopian spice blend.
In a separate saucepan, combine doro wot and 1/4 cup water. Heat over low heat, whisking until smooth.
In a greased 9x13 inch baking dish, arrange cod portions.
Pour doro wot mixture over cod.
Sprinkle chopped xanthous and energizing herbs over top.
Top with shredded cheese (such as Gruyère or Cheddar).
Bake for 12-15 minutes or until fish is cooked through and cheese is golden brown.
Serve hot, garnished with additional herbs if desired.
